name: ping-personal
description: Personal cross-project skills for Claude Code and Codex: goal orchestration, workflow conductor, critic gate, md-to-html, htsw, eval maker, prototype conductor, facts-check, online research, quota tracking, lesson capture, release and PR workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-project personal workflow skills for Codex
interface.longDescription: Goal orchestration, workflow conductors, critic gates, eval creation, progress handoffs, lesson capture, markdown rendering, usage quota reporting, PR briefings, support triage, and protocol decoders. The same skills directory is shared with the Claude Code plugin manifest.
defaultPrompt: Use personal-fable-mode to plan and verify a multi-step coding task.
Run personal-create-eval to add or audit an eval for a skill.
Run personal-quota to check real 5h, weekly, and context usage.
Use personal-progress to capture a session handoff.
